hypothesis_en: Mr President, Mr Barroso, I was wondering how much time we can leave for the groups to meet. I think not more than half an hour. No more than half an hour means certainly at 12.15 we continue the session.
reference_en: (1.49) thank you very much Mr Barroso (1.53) (2.01) I was just asking how much time we have for the groups to meet together now I don't think any more than half an hour ((President starts speaking in Spanish)) no más de media= ((President stops speaking)) half an hour now for the groups to hold meetings till quarter to twelve (1.61) then at quarter to twelve we'll resume the session
source_es: OK muchas gracias Señor Barroso estaba consultando cuánto tiempo podemos dejar para que los grupos se reúnan creo que no más de media hora (1.6) no más de media hora quiere decir ciertamente las doce menos cuarto a co= a las doce menos cuarto continuamos la sesión muchas gracias
